symptoms.symptom_name: Puffy ('sausage') fingers with diffuse myalgia and flu-like fatigue

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Puffy fingers with myalgia/fatigue are characteristic of an MCTD flare.

symptoms.symptom_name: No pulmonary/cardiac features or high fever

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of pleuritic/cardiac features and fever argues against organ crisis/infection.
No critical Raynaud's or encephalopathy features lowers crisis probability.

symptoms.symptom_name: Known MCTD (anti-U1 RNP), no new rash

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Known MCTD supports a flare as the cause.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine GP/rheumatology review with bloods (inflammatory markers, renal function, muscle enzymes) and urinalysis
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assess flare activity and screen for subclinical organ involvement electively.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Same-day assessment if organ red flags develop
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: For pulmonary/cardiac/renal features or critical Raynaud's.
